defaults.merge_policy: Preserve partial reviewer evidence, branch status, and degraded confidence markers.
defaults.risk_policy: Preserve minority severe findings and mark merger-added claims explicitly.
defaults.output_format: Markdown sections: Summary, Consensus, Minority Findings, Contradictions, Next Actions.

template: pi -p --model {model} --thinking {thinking} {tools?--tools:--no-tools} {tools} Merge these subagent outputs using mode {mode}: {inputs}. Merge policy: {merge_policy}. Risk policy: {risk_policy}. Begin the response with ACTOR_REVIEW_RESULT on its own line. Output format: {output_format}
